message:
🐛 Fix snooze restore reactivity and standardize on 'critical' terminology

- Fix CardRecommendations to re-render when snooze state changes
- Fix MissionSuggestions to re-render when snooze state changes
- Change 'urgent' to 'critical' for consistency across both components

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
